community.description.message: Discover community-shared AI prompts on AiShort. Browse user templates, swap optimization tips, and contribute your own to grow the library.

community.notFoundDesc.message: This prompt may have been deleted or set to private

community.tagline.message: User-contributed AI prompts. Sort by newest or most-liked, search and filter; like and save after logging in.

description.exportPrompts.short.message: Export as JSON file for backup

description.importPrompts.short.message: Import prompts and favorites from JSON file

faq.scenario.a.message: It works well for tasks related to the title and description on this page. If the first attempt is not ideal, provide more context inside the placeholder, or append constraints like “answer step by step” or “give examples”.

faq.scenario.q.message: What scenarios is this prompt best suited for?

faq.tips.a.message: First, make the [placeholder] more specific (add style, length, domain details). Second, follow up unsatisfying replies with “make it more X”. Third, compare outputs across Claude / ChatGPT / Gemini and similar models.

faq.tips.q.message: How can I improve the output quality?

faq.usage.a.message: Copy the prompt, replace the [placeholder] in square brackets with your own input, then paste it into ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, Qwen, or any conversational AI interface that supports natural language and send it.

faq.usage.q.message: How do I use this prompt?

feedback.description.message: Your feedback is important to us!

feedback.subtitle.message: Bug reports, feature requests, usage questions—every voice welcome

filter.operator.all.tip.message: Show prompts matching all selected tags

filter.operator.any.tip.message: Show prompts matching any selected tag

homepage.description.message: Curated AI prompt templates for writing, coding, and translation. One-click copy to ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or DeepSeek for precise, ready-to-use output.

homepage.slogan.message: Curated AI prompts. One-click ready to use.

homepage.title.message: AI Prompt Library for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini & DeepSeek

howto.step1.text.message: Copy the prompt template to your clipboard.

howto.step2.text.message: Replace the [placeholder] sections with your specific content.

howto.step3.text.message: Paste into ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, or another conversational AI interface and run it.

label.sharePrompt.message: Would you like to share this prompt on the public page?
